rule.desc: Organize packages by feature, not by technical layer.
rule.rationale: Feature-based packages improve cohesion and local reasoning.

rule.desc: Define interfaces at system boundaries; keep implementations package-private.
rule.rationale: Interfaces enable testing, substitution, and stable contracts.

rule.desc: Use the smallest visibility that works; avoid public fields.
rule.rationale: Smaller surface area reduces coupling and misuse.

rule.desc: Use builders when a constructor has more than 4 parameters.
rule.rationale: Builders improve readability and reduce parameter order bugs.

rule.desc: Prefer named static factories over overloaded constructors.
rule.rationale: Names communicate intent and allow caching.

rule.desc: Utility classes must be `final` with a private constructor.
rule.rationale: Prevents instantiation and subclassing of static helpers.
